name: loop_host_forensics_fast
description: 从文件或 inputs 读取主机列表；可选 ssh_user。每台巡检结束立即写入 host_triage/ 下独立 md；循环态仅保留包含 success/verdict/per_host_md 的轻量结果索引，末步只生成索引与 manifest，避免最后节点 summary 因全量结果过大而超时。

nodes.name: 初始化主机列表与日志
nodes.description: 解析 hosts、ssh_user；创建 output_dir 与 host_triage/；写总日志头并初始化轻量结果索引。
nodes.code:
import datetime
import os
from pathlib import Path
from flocks.workspace.manager import WorkspaceManager

hosts = inputs.get("hosts")
if hosts is None:
    hosts = []
if isinstance(hosts, str):
    hosts = [hosts.strip()] if str(hosts).strip() else []
elif not isinstance(hosts, list):
    hosts = []

hosts_file = str(inputs.get("hosts_file") or "").strip()
if hosts_file:
    p = Path(hosts_file).expanduser()
    if p.is_file():
        for line in p.read_text(encoding="utf-8").splitlines():
            line = line.strip()
            if not line or line.startswith("#"):
                continue
            hosts.append(line)

seen = set()
uniq = []
for h in hosts:
    hs = str(h).strip()
    if not hs or hs in seen:
        continue
    seen.add(hs)
    uniq.append(hs)
hosts = uniq

su = inputs.get("ssh_user")
if isinstance(su, str):
    su = su.strip()
else:
    su = ""

ws = WorkspaceManager.get_instance()
oday = datetime.date.today().isoformat()
output_dir = str(ws.get_workspace_dir() / "outputs" / oday)
os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)
per_host_dir = os.path.join(output_dir, "host_triage")
batch_report_path = os.path.join(output_dir, "batch_host_triage_log.md")

outputs["hosts"] = hosts
outputs["ssh_user"] = su
outputs["host_idx"] = 0
outputs["triage_results"] = []
outputs["output_dir"] = output_dir
outputs["per_host_dir"] = per_host_dir
outputs["batch_report_path"] = batch_report_path
outputs["should_continue"] = "continue" if hosts else "exit"

if hosts:
    os.makedirs(per_host_dir, exist_ok=True)
    header = (
        "# 批量主机快速巡检日志\n\n"
        "- 开始日期: " + oday + "\n"
        "- 主机数量: " + str(len(hosts)) + "\n"
        "- 逐台报告目录: `host_triage/`（每台一个独立 `.md`）\n"
        "- 工作流状态: 仅保留逐台结果的轻量索引，完整正文只写入单机报告文件\n"
    )
    if su:
        header += "- SSH 用户: `" + su + "`（`ssh_run_script` 的 host 使用 `user@<目标>`）\n"
    else:
        header += "- SSH 用户: （未指定 `ssh_user`，仅下列主机标识、Agent/工具默认账户，一般为 root）\n"
    header += "\n---\n\n"
    with open(batch_report_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(header)

nodes.name: 循环判断
nodes.description: should_continue 为 continue 则巡检下一台，为 exit 则结束循环

nodes.name: 单台快速巡检
nodes.description: task(host-forensics-fast)；每台写独立 host_triage/NNNN_slug.md；循环态仅保留文件路径、执行状态与 verdict，避免累积完整正文。
nodes.code:
import os
import re

hosts = inputs.get("hosts", [])
idx = int(inputs.get("host_idx", 0))
host = hosts[idx] if 0 <= idx < len(hosts) else ""
host = str(host).strip()

su = inputs.get("ssh_user")
if isinstance(su, str):
    su = su.strip()
else:
    su = ""

if "@" in host:
    ssh_target = host
    user_hint = (
        "主机列表项已含 `user@host` 形式，请直接使用下列 host 参数，勿再拼接用户。"
    )
elif su:
    ssh_target = su + "@" + host
    user_hint = (
        "工作流已指定 `ssh_user`=`" + su + "`。`ssh_run_script` 的 host 参数必须使用 `user@host`："
        + ssh_target + "。"
    )
else:
    ssh_target = host
    user_hint = (
        "未指定 `ssh_user`，请使用下列裸主机标识连接（Agent/工具默认 SSH 用户，一般为 root）："
        + ssh_target + "。"
    )

def _extract_verdict(markdown_text):
    if not markdown_text:
        return "UNKNOWN"
    match = re.search(
        r"(?im)^\s*\*{0,2}Verdict\*{0,2}\s*:\s*"
        r"(CLEAN|SUSPICIOUS|COMPROMISED|UNKNOWN)\b",
        markdown_text,
    )
    if not match:
        return "UNKNOWN"
    return str(match.group(1)).upper()

idx1 = idx + 1
desc = "Fast triage item " + str(idx1)
prompt = (
    "你是 host-forensics-fast 工作模式：对下列目标执行 Linux 主机快速安全巡检（首轮研判）。\n"
    "请使用 ssh_run_script，script_path 为 `.flocks/plugins/agents/host-forensics-fast/scripts/triage_fast.sh`。\n"
    + user_hint
    + "\n\n本次 `ssh_run_script` 的 host 参数必须使用：\n"
    + ssh_target
    + "\n\n请输出简洁 Markdown：结论、可疑项、风险判断、后续建议。"
)
res = tool.run_safe(
    "task",
    description=desc,
    prompt=prompt,
    subagent_type="host-forensics-fast",
    run_in_background=False,
)
text = res.get("text") or ""
ok = bool(res.get("success"))
err = res.get("error") or ""
verdict = _extract_verdict(text)

per_host_dir = str(inputs.get("per_host_dir") or "").strip()
if not per_host_dir:
    od = str(inputs.get("output_dir") or "").strip()
    if od:
        per_host_dir = os.path.join(od, "host_triage")
    else:
        per_host_dir = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(inputs.get("batch_report_path") or ".") or ".", "host_triage")
os.makedirs(per_host_dir, exist_ok=True)

def _slug(s):
    t = re.sub(r"[^0-9A-Za-z._@-]+", "_", str(s)).strip("_")
    t = t.replace("@", "_at_")
    return (t[:56] if t else "host")

nh = len(hosts)
base = "{:04d}_{}".format(idx1, _slug(ssh_target))
per_host_md = os.path.join(per_host_dir, base + ".md")
lines = [
    "# 单主机快速巡检结果",
    "",
    "- 批次内序号: {} / {}".format(idx1, nh),
    "- 列表项 host: `{}`".format(host),
    "- ssh_target: `{}`".format(ssh_target),
    "- success: {}".format(ok),
    "- verdict: {}".format(verdict),
    "",
]
if err:
    lines.extend(["## 错误", "", "```", str(err), "```", ""])
else:
    lines.extend(["## 子 Agent 输出", "", (text if text else "_(无正文)_"), ""])
with open(per_host_md, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    f.write("\n".join(lines))

tr = inputs.get("triage_results", [])
tr = list(tr) if isinstance(tr, list) else []
tr.append(
    {
        "host": host,
        "ssh_user": su,
        "ssh_target": ssh_target,
        "success": ok,
        "verdict": verdict,
        "error": err,
        "per_host_md": per_host_md,
    }
)
outputs["triage_results"] = tr

batch_report_path = inputs.get("batch_report_path", "")
section = (
    "\n## [{}/{}] `{}`\n\n".format(idx1, nh, ssh_target)
    + "- 单独报告: `{}`\n".format(per_host_md)
    + "- 执行结果: {}\n".format("成功" if ok else "失败")
    + "- 判定结果: `{}`\n\n---\n".format(verdict)
)
if batch_report_path:
    with open(batch_report_path, "a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(section)

outputs["last_host"] = host
outputs["last_ssh_target"] = ssh_target
outputs["last_success"] = ok
outputs["last_verdict"] = verdict
outputs["last_per_host_md"] = per_host_md

nodes.name: 下一台主机
nodes.code:
hosts = inputs.get("hosts", [])
idx = int(inputs.get("host_idx", 0)) + 1
outputs["host_idx"] = idx
outputs["should_continue"] = "continue" if idx < len(hosts) else "exit"

nodes.name: 生成索引与清单
nodes.description: 无 LLM：写 batch_host_triage_index.md、manifest.json、轻量 results.json，并汇总 success/verdict 分布。
nodes.code:
import datetime
import json
import os
from flocks.workspace.manager import WorkspaceManager

results = inputs.get("triage_results") or []
if not isinstance(results, list):
    results = []

ws = WorkspaceManager.get_instance()
oday = datetime.date.today().isoformat()
output_dir = str(ws.get_workspace_dir() / "outputs" / oday)
os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)
index_path = os.path.join(output_dir, "batch_host_triage_index.md")
manifest_path = os.path.join(output_dir, "batch_host_triage_manifest.json")
results_json_path = os.path.join(output_dir, "batch_host_triage_results.json")
batch_report_path = inputs.get("batch_report_path", "")
per_host_dir = str(inputs.get("per_host_dir") or "").strip() or os.path.join(output_dir, "host_triage")
hosts = inputs.get("hosts", [])
if not isinstance(hosts, list):
    hosts = []

su = inputs.get("ssh_user")
if isinstance(su, str):
    su = su.strip()
else:
    su = ""

verdict_order = ["CLEAN", "SUSPICIOUS", "COMPROMISED", "UNKNOWN"]
verdict_counts = {name: 0 for name in verdict_order}
for r in results:
    if not isinstance(r, dict):
        continue
    verdict = str(r.get("verdict") or "UNKNOWN").upper()
    if verdict not in verdict_counts:
        verdict = "UNKNOWN"
    verdict_counts[verdict] += 1

n_ok = sum(1 for r in results if isinstance(r, dict) and r.get("success"))
n_total = len(results)

lines = [
    "# 批量主机快速巡检 — 索引",
    "",
    "每台主机的完整输出已写在 `host_triage/` 下独立 `.md` 文件中；本文件只保留目录信息与轻量状态（**无 LLM 调用**，避免大批量巡检末步超时）。",
    "",
    "- 日期: `{}`".format(oday),
    "- 逐台目录: `{}`".format(per_host_dir),
    "- 合计: {} 台".format(n_total),
    "- 执行成功: {} 台".format(n_ok),
    "- 执行失败: {} 台".format(n_total - n_ok),
    "- CLEAN: {} 台".format(verdict_counts["CLEAN"]),
    "- SUSPICIOUS: {} 台".format(verdict_counts["SUSPICIOUS"]),
    "- COMPROMISED: {} 台".format(verdict_counts["COMPROMISED"]),
    "- UNKNOWN: {} 台".format(verdict_counts["UNKNOWN"]),
    "",
    "## 逐台文件与状态",
    "",
]
if not results:
    lines.append("_无可巡检记录（未执行子 Agent 或主机列表为空）。_")
else:
    for i, r in enumerate(results, 1):
        if not isinstance(r, dict):
            continue
        p = r.get("per_host_md") or ""
        lab = r.get("ssh_target") or r.get("host", "")
        ok = r.get("success", False)
        verdict = str(r.get("verdict") or "UNKNOWN").upper()
        if verdict not in verdict_counts:
            verdict = "UNKNOWN"
        bn = os.path.basename(p) if p else "(未生成文件)"
        exec_status = "成功" if ok else "失败"
        lines.append(
            "{}. `{}` — 执行: {} — 判定: `{}` — 文件: `{}`".format(
                i,
                lab,
                exec_status,
                verdict,
                bn,
            )
        )
        if p:
            lines.append("   - 路径: `{}`".format(p))

index_body = "\n".join(lines)
with open(index_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    f.write(index_body)

items = []
for r in results:
    if not isinstance(r, dict):
        continue
    verdict = str(r.get("verdict") or "UNKNOWN").upper()
    if verdict not in verdict_counts:
        verdict = "UNKNOWN"
    items.append(
        {
            "host": r.get("host"),
            "ssh_target": r.get("ssh_target"),
            "success": r.get("success"),
            "verdict": verdict,
            "error": r.get("error"),
            "per_host_md": r.get("per_host_md"),
        }
    )
manifest = {
    "date": oday,
    "output_dir": output_dir,
    "per_host_dir": per_host_dir,
    "hosts": hosts,
    "ssh_user": su,
    "batch_report_path": batch_report_path,
    "index_path": index_path,
    "items": items,
}
with open(manifest_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    json.dump(manifest, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)

bundle = {
    "date": oday,
    "hosts": hosts,
    "ssh_user": su,
    "output_dir": output_dir,
    "per_host_dir": per_host_dir,
    "batch_report_path": batch_report_path,
    "index_path": index_path,
    "manifest_path": manifest_path,
    "triage_results": items,
}
with open(results_json_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    json.dump(bundle, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)

summary = (
    "批量巡检完成：共 {} 台，执行成功 {} 台，执行失败 {} 台；"
    "判定结果为 CLEAN {} 台、SUSPICIOUS {} 台、COMPROMISED {} 台、UNKNOWN {} 台。"
    "逐台完整结果已写入 `{}`，索引见 `{}`。"
).format(
    n_total,
    n_ok,
    n_total - n_ok,
    verdict_counts["CLEAN"],
    verdict_counts["SUSPICIOUS"],
    verdict_counts["COMPROMISED"],
    verdict_counts["UNKNOWN"],
    per_host_dir,
    index_path,
)
outputs["executive_summary"] = summary
outputs["index_path"] = index_path
outputs["manifest_path"] = manifest_path
outputs["results_json_path"] = results_json_path
outputs["batch_report_path"] = batch_report_path
outputs["per_host_dir"] = per_host_dir
